_note: Synthetic generic Master Supply Agreement between 'Acme Supplier' and 'Buyer' — no real client/deal/counterparty/firm content (repo privacy rule). Drives the F08d clause-drafting risk gate: the draft must reuse the document's defined terms (not coin new ones), leave a bracketed placeholder instead of a fabricated figure where the operator must supply a value, and return an empty body when the description is too vague to draft anything grounded.

nodes.heading: Confidentiality
nodes.body: Each party shall keep confidential all Confidential Information disclosed to it by the other party and shall not use such Confidential Information except for the purposes of this Agreement.

nodes.heading: Delivery
nodes.body: Acme Supplier shall deliver the Goods to the Buyer within the Lead Time at the Delivery Point specified in each Purchase Order.

nodes.heading: Pricing and Payment
nodes.body: The Buyer shall pay the Price for the Goods set out in Schedule 1 against each undisputed invoice.

nodes.heading: Term and Termination
nodes.body: This Agreement commences on the Effective Date and continues until terminated in accordance with this clause.

cases.name: reuse defined term — return/destroy confidential materials
cases.description: Add a clause requiring each party, when this Agreement ends, to return or destroy all of the other party's confidential materials in its possession.

cases.name: reuse defined term — late delivery against the Lead Time
cases.description: Add a sub-clause giving the Buyer a remedy if Acme Supplier fails to deliver the Goods within the agreed delivery time.

cases.name: placeholder not a fabricated figure — termination notice period
cases.description: Add a clause letting either party terminate this Agreement for convenience by giving the other prior written notice.
